name: Tarte
tagline: Made slow, the way mornings should be.
footerBlurb: Crafted coffee & cozy moments on the corner of Maple Row. Roasted, pulled, and baked in-house since 2014.
newsletterBlurb: Seasonal drinks & events, once a month.

features.title: Signature Coffee
features.desc: Single-origin beans, roasted in small batches and pulled by hand for a cleaner, sweeter cup.

features.title: Fresh Bakery
features.desc: Croissants laminated overnight and pastries baked before sunrise — flour, butter, patience.

features.title: Specialty Drinks
features.desc: Seasonal cold brews, espresso tonics, and house syrups made fresh — coffee, reimagined.

specialties.title: Espresso Bar
specialties.caption: Watch each shot pulled to order at the marble bar.

specialties.title: Fresh Pastries
specialties.caption: Hand-laminated croissants and tarts, baked at dawn.

specialties.title: Breakfast Plates
specialties.caption: Slow mornings deserve something warm and unhurried.

specialties.title: Cold Brew Bar
specialties.caption: Steeped 18 hours for a smooth, low-acid pour.

specialties.title: Dessert of the Day
specialties.caption: A rotating cake or tart from the pastry case.

specialties.title: Beans to Take Home
specialties.caption: Retail bags of our current single-origin roast.

storyTeaser: Tarte began in 2014 as a single cart and a stubborn belief that a good cup is worth slowing down for. Today we roast our own beans, laminate our own dough, and still greet most regulars by name.
Everything is made in small batches, the unhurried way — because the best mornings can’t be rushed.
aboutProse: Tarte started as a single cart on the corner of Maple Row, run by two friends who couldn’t find a cup they loved. Ten years on, we roast our own beans, laminate our own dough, and still pull every shot by hand.
We believe the best mornings are unhurried — so we make everything in small batches, the slow way, and we save a seat for whoever needs one.
